scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('.env')){fs.copyFileSync('.env.example','.env');console.log('Created .env from .env.example. Edit it to add your GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID.');}else{console.log('.env already exists.');}"
scripts.clean: rm -rf assets content options popup sidepanel manifest.json service-worker-loader.js && echo 'Cleaned build artifacts.'
